what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a design-source JPEG image asset named company-info/p-03 and points to its blob.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger record for an image/jpeg asset
Body simply states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-03.jpg'
standouts: Explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
conventions: Follows the ledger frontmatter schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and links
Uses an image:// URI for the asset address
Leaves dimensions and links empty, breaking completeness expectations for an image record
concerns: Zero width and height suggest missing image analysis
Empty links leave the asset isolated from related records
No description of what the image depicts
notes: Ledger stub for a design-source JPEG in company-info with zero dimensions and no relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
What visual content does p-03 contain?
Which consumers or processes are expected to use this ledger record?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a SOURCE design ground-truth image; the file acts as a metadata pointer to the blob, but lacks dimensions and links.
intention_signals: To register and make discoverable an authoritative design-source image asset for the company-info channel.
contribution: Provides a stable ledger identity, blob pointer, and channel classification for a design-source image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the design-source JPEG image company-info/p-03 with a blob reference, zero dimensions, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and point to a design ground-truth image asset in the company-info channel.
